subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath turned towards the Most Great Remembrance, when He came from the heaven of eternity with a sovereignty that conquered all who dwell therein [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن اقبل الی الذکر الاعظم اذ اتی من سماء القدم بسلطان غلب من فی
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to the people of the world, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
